summary: Iteration 2 frontend testing of new popup/dialog/popover interactivity for PrecastMES. Verified every flow listed in the review_request: header notifications panel (5 items), help panel (4 items + toast on each), settings dropdown (4 items + toast on Bahasa), user menu (Profil/Preferensi/Ganti Shift/Keluar toasts), Dashboard Perbarui (loading->success 'Data berhasil diperbarui'), Ekspor Laporan ('Laporan dashboard berhasil diunduh'), Lihat semua / Log lengkap info toasts; Production Orders: Order Baru opens FormDialog with all fields, Batal closes, submit closes + success toast, Ekspor toast, Filter popover with date-from/to + Line/Prioritas selects with Reset/Terapkan toasts, eye view (po-view-0) opens DetailDialog showing 3 sections (Informasi Order, Jadwal, Material & BOM) plus status badge + progress; Master Data: Produk Tambah & Kategori Tambah open FormDialog, search 'U-Ditch' filters rows, nonexistent search shows 'Tidak ada data yang cocok', Ekspor toast; Production Planning: Order Baru FormDialog, Ekspor Jadwal toast, prev/next week toasts ('Minggu sebelumnya'/'Minggu berikutnya'), Harian/Mingguan/Bulanan toggle toasts; Curing 'Mulai Batch Baru', QC 'Inspeksi Baru' (PO/Jenis/Jumlah/Lulus/Kuat Tekan/Inspektur/Hasil/Catatan fields verified), Sales 'Sales Order Baru', Delivery 'DO Baru', Purchasing 'PO Baru', Maintenance 'Work Order Baru' — all open FormDialog; Reports Cetak ('Membuka dialog cetak...') and Ekspor PDF ('Laporan PDF berhasil diunduh'). Dialogs close via Batal, X icon, Escape, and outside click. ZERO JavaScript console errors across all interactions.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: FormDialog handleSubmit does no field validation despite `required: true` flag being passed for many fields (e.g. PO product/qty/customer, Produk kode/nama). The red asterisk is rendered but the Simpan button will submit empty forms. Acceptable for a mock UI, but consider adding HTML5 `required` attribute on the Input/Textarea (and disabling select validation) so the asterisk is meaningful.

Minor: NotificationsPopover 'Tandai sudah dibaca' and 'Lihat semua notifikasi →' anchor buttons inside the popover are inert (no onClick handler). Easy follow-up: wire them to a toast like the other buttons.

Minor: Sonner toast appears at top-right and can briefly visually overlap the header buttons (settings/user-menu) at default duration (~4s). Not a functional bug — clicks still register once toast animates away — but consider toast position 'bottom-right' to avoid covering header controls.

Minor: FilterPopover Reset button only emits a toast 'Filter direset' but does not actually clear the date inputs or select values (no state reset for inputs). For a mock this is fine; flagging for transparency.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Toasts use sonner with selector [data-sonner-toast]. Popovers use Radix; close via Escape, X icon, or outside click. Key testids: header-notifications -> notifications-panel (5 notif-{0..4}), header-help -> help-panel (help-item-{0..3}), header-settings -> setting-language/timezone/theme/account, header-user-menu -> menu-profile/preferences/shift/logout. Dashboard: btn-refresh, btn-export. PO: btn-create-po, po-search, po-status-filter, po-filter-trigger, po-filter-content, po-filter-apply, po-filter-reset, po-filter-date-from/to, po-view-{i} -> po-detail-{i}-content, po-create-{field|submit|cancel}-content. MasterData: products-table-add/search/export, products-table-create-{submit|cancel}, row-products-table-{i}, master-tabs. Planning: planning-prev-week, planning-next-week, planning-view-day/week/month. Sidebar: sidebar-nav-{dashboard|master-data|planning|production-orders|production-execution|curing|quality|inventory|sales|delivery|purchasing|maintenance|reports}. Tip: dismiss toasts (wait until [data-sonner-toast] count==0) between header-area clicks to avoid the toast covering the click target.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All 27 listed test scenarios in the review_request work correctly with zero console errors.
